text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is a yearly grand event
where Umamusume of the classic and senior years
compete for the time-honored Autumn Shield.

This race holds particularly special meaning for
each of the racers standing in the paddock at this
moment.
King Halo, Special Week, or Seiun Sky.

Which of these Golden Generation racers will lay
claim to both center stage and the Autumn
Shield?
